features: 99% ARNICA: Delicate and natural body gel, with 99% Arnica extract, relieves particularly stressed skin even in case of joint and muscle tension, providing a long-lasting refreshing effect
FORMULA: Menthol, Arnica and Eucalyptus have recognized cosmetic toning and refreshing properties, aloe gel gives a pleasant sensation of softness on skin
BENEFITS: Provides relief to particularly stressed skin, even in the case of joint and muscle tension - dermatologically tested product that absorbs quickly and is not greasy
HOW TO USE: Apply arnica gel onto your skin several times a day, massage gently on the affected area until the product is completely absorbed
description: Product Description The delicate and natural formulation of Arnica Gel 98%, is indicated for sports people who often suffer from contractures and stiffness. Arnica Gel 98% in 500 ml jar is a Made in Italy gel made with mountain arnica water (98%), ideal for massages dedicated to the relief of muscles, tendons and joints. Arnica water is essential to give the product the consistency of a gel but at the same time guarantee a very high content of active ingredients. It has a high concentration of flavonoids, which have an antioxidant action for the walls of the capillaries, reducing their fragility and permeability. This makes our product ideal for muscle and joint massages and for skin tension, benefits particularly sought after by sports people. The gel is also enriched with Aloe Vera, which has an emollient, antioxidant and anti-ageing action, Eucalyptus essential oil, with stimulating properties, and Menthol crystals, which give a pleasant refreshing sensation and have a tonic and stimulating action. It does not contain ethyl alcohol or synthetic dyes (it is orange-tinged for the Carrot). The gel absorbs quickly and is non-sticky. Although arnica montana has been used since time immemorial to relieve horses in the event of falls and muscle fatigue, today it has also become a faithful ally of humans: this is why our product is known as arnica for horses for human use! Ingredients ARNICA MONTANA FLOWER WATER, MENTHA ARVENSIS EXTRACT, ZEA MAYS GERM OIL, MENTHOL, ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF JUICE, DAUCUS CAROTA SATIVA ROOT, EUCALYPTUS GLOBULUS OIL, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, CARBOMER, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, ISOPROPYL MYRISTATE, LIMONENE, TOCOPHEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN. Safety Warning Do not ingest. In case of contact with eyes or mucous membranes, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Do not use in case of known allergy or hypersensitive to any of tge ingredients. Keep tightly closed and out of reach of children See more
